name: wireless-regdb
title: wireless-regdb
description:
wireless regulatory database for Linux
This package provides a machine-readable database of legal
regulations on radio emissions that affect use of wireless networking.
The Linux kernel and drivers use this to maintain compliance with
those regulations.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use wireless-regdb because wireless regulatory database for Linux.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use wireless-regdb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wireless-regdb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wireless-regdb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
